reviews.author: Andi Kai
reviews.text: This is the first time that I am using them, they are great. Very nice and accommodating, just all the way around AWESOME.

reviews.author: Olga Mazas
reviews.text: The gentleman was incredibly kind and attentive. His employees are super friendly and very professional.

reviews.author: Ashley Preston
reviews.text: Mr. Kevin provided exceptional customer service and delivered high-quality work — my car looked brand new when I picked it up.

reviews.author: TJ Jones
reviews.text: Kevin is patient, and is willing to satisfy all of customer needs. The communication was great. He answered all my calls.

reviews.author: Julia Raffetto
reviews.text: Got perfect work done on my like new Lexus. The service was great, the repairs were completed quickly, and pricing was reasonable.

notes: 24 years in business (9 at current Central Ave location). Owner/lead Kevin (last name not disclosed). Lifetime warranty on workmanship (directory-listed, verify with owner). No dedicated website currently — this build may be first. Paraphrased themes ($4,800 vs $2,860, Honda Civic door skins, Ford Mustang 'coco') intentionally excluded to avoid fabrication.

capture_attempts.reason: 31 reviews listed, snippets not attributable by name
